summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. Deterministic validation identified #90161 and #86637 as security-sensitive for this cluster, so those two PRs are routed to central OpenClaw security handling with non-mutating route_security actions. The other eight listed targets remain independently scoped open pull requests with no shared canonical and should stay open for normal maintainer review, author follow-up, proof repair, or draft finalization rather than being closed or merged by this cluster.

actions.reason: Validator classified this target as security-sensitive, so ProjectClownfish must not close, merge, label, comment on, or repair it; route to central OpenClaw security handling.
Independently scoped CLI behavior PR with passing proof but failing dependency checks; keep open for maintainer/check follow-up.

Independently scoped maintainer draft with proof signal; no closure, merge, or security routing is appropriate.

The PR contains security-shaped exploitability/resource-exhaustion language and the validator classified it as security-sensitive, so ProjectClownfish must route it to central OpenClaw security handling without mutation.
